testcase.name: resumeSuccess
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-05T15:35:11.482+05:00 INFO 79019 --- [smart-print-server] [o-auto-1-exec-8] c.p.api.SimulationController : POST /reset 2026-06-05T15:35:11.483+05:00 INFO 79019 --- [smart-print-server] [o-auto-1-exec-8] c.p.service.SimulationServiceImpl : Simulation STOPPED (was RUNNING) 2026-06-05T15:35:11.483+05:00 INFO 79019 --- [smart-print-server] [o-auto-1-exec-8] c.p.service.SimulationServiceImpl : Simulation RESET 2026-06-05T15:35:11.491+05:00 INFO 79019 --- [smart-print-server] [o-auto-1-exec-9] c.p.api.SimulationController : POST /start — algo=HYBRID users=3 printers=2 capacity=10 2026-06-05T15:35:11.491+05:00 INFO 79019 --- [smart-print-server] [o-auto-1-exec-9] c.p.service.SimulationServiceImpl : Simulation STARTED | users=3 printers=2 queue=10 algo=HYBRID speed=1.0x 2026-06-05T15:35:11.498+05:00 INFO 79019 --- [smart-print-server] [-auto-1-exec-10] c.p.api.SimulationController : POST /pause 2026-06-05T15:35:11.498+05:00 INFO 79019 --- [smart-print-server] [-auto-1-exec-10] c.p.service.SimulationServiceImpl : Simulation PAUSED 2026-06-05T15:35:11.503+05:00 INFO 79019 --- [smart-print-server] [o-auto-1-exec-1] c.p.api.SimulationController : POST /resume 2026-06-05T15:35:11.503+05:00 INFO 79019 --- [smart-print-server] [o-auto-1-exec-1] c.p.service.SimulationServiceImpl : Simulation RESUMED

testcase.name: resumeWhenNotPaused
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-05T15:35:11.515+05:00 INFO 79019 --- [smart-print-server] [o-auto-1-exec-2] c.p.api.SimulationController : POST /reset 2026-06-05T15:35:11.515+05:00 INFO 79019 --- [smart-print-server] [o-auto-1-exec-2] c.p.service.SimulationServiceImpl : Simulation STOPPED (was RUNNING) 2026-06-05T15:35:11.515+05:00 INFO 79019 --- [smart-print-server] [o-auto-1-exec-2] c.p.service.SimulationServiceImpl : Simulation RESET 2026-06-05T15:35:11.520+05:00 INFO 79019 --- [smart-print-server] [o-auto-1-exec-3] c.p.api.SimulationController : POST /resume 2026-06-05T15:35:11.521+05:00 WARN 79019 --- [smart-print-server] [o-auto-1-exec-3] c.p.api.GlobalExceptionHandler : 409 – Cannot resume: simulation is not paused
